steps.title: Recognize the core requirement
steps.content: The goal is explicit: indicate the size of the refuge. The notes provide exactly one measurement for this: 3,592 acres.

steps.title: Find the choice containing this measurement
steps.content: Choice B directly includes the size: “encompasses 3,592 acres of land.” The other three choices focus on the species (A and D), management (C), or activity restrictions, omitting the acreage. That matches choice B — B is correct.
